div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px;

div.p: Select a report to view the full chart and analysis

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;

div.p: Track and manage the total work remaining within a sprint. Summarize team performance.
Visualize a sprint's completed work and compare it with its total scope and progress.
Predict the amount of work your team can commit to in future sprints.

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;
background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: See which columns accumulate more work items and identify bottlenecks in your workflow.

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Understand how much time it takes to ship work items through the deployment pipeline.

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Track story points created per week/month by project and team members.

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;

div.p: Analyze team performance and predict project health using Machine Learning.

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: Monitor time elapsed, work complete, blockers and flagged tickets in real time.

div.style: background: white; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer;
div.p: View the distribution of all tickets by status across your projects.

div.style: display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;

button.name: action_analyze_team

tr.td: Save the record to see data

div.p: Lancez ou rejoignez une réunion vidéo directement depuis le dashboard.

div.div: Entrez le code ou le lien

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px;

div.p: Google Meet ne peut pas s'afficher dans un iframe. Cliquez ci-dessous pour ouvrir dans un nouvel onglet.
